required.hint: Architecture toggle for the requests metric. '1' = x86 (default), '2' = arm64. Without it the pricing engine has no architecture context and silently zeros the request-cost path. Not a math operand — derivation rules can't catch it.
Architecture toggle for the provisioned-concurrency metric. Same scheme as selectArchitectureRequests. Required even when not using provisioned concurrency.

traps: durationOfEachRequest is numericInput subtype: bare string '200' (no unit object). An older catalog typo'd it as 'requestDuration' — silently accepted by save API, ignored by pricing engine, $0 result.
Lambda hides duration/memory/architecture in the CSV summary regardless of value — present in editable estimate, absent in CSV oracle. Don't conclude 'partial' from CSV mismatch.
